textPlain: Code submissions either meet the standards of the project or they don't. Whether it was generated by human or AI is irrelevant.

> We take no shortcuts.I mean... they areisn't that the point? not as if "AI" leads to higher quality is it> Certain more esoteric concerns about AI code being somehow inherently inferior to “real code” are not based in reality.if this was true why the need to point out "we're not vibe coding", and create this process around it?fork and move on

Why did you remove your original comment of "time to use another password manager"? Do you lack the courage of your convictions? Why not make the change yourself?Why don't you fork it and maintain it, if AI generated code offends you so much?Anyone can criticize. Be "the man in the arena". Live up to the values you speak of. Stop using any code that might ever have been AI generated.
We did not create this process for AI, it has been our process since 2016.
